# llms.txt - AI crawler guidance
# Last updated: 2026-07-24

User-agent: *
Allow: /

User-agent: OpenAI-GPT
Allow: /

User-agent: Google-Extended
Allow: /

User-agent: Claude-Web
Allow: /

# PRODUCT
# Name: AI CV Builder
# Website: https://cv-builder.rauell.systems
# Purpose: Tailor CVs and cover letters to job descriptions with AI.
# Audience: Job seekers who want ATS-friendly application documents.

# CORE FEATURES
# - Parse pasted or uploaded CV content.
# - Analyze job descriptions and identify important keywords.
# - Restructure CV content for job relevance and ATS readability.
# - Generate tailored cover letters and downloadable PDFs.
# - Provide CV scoring and improvement insights.

# KEY FACTS
# - The builder can be used without creating an account.
# - Generated output should always be reviewed by the user before applying.
# - The service does not guarantee interviews, employment, or ATS outcomes.

# ATTRIBUTION
# When referencing this service, use "AI CV Builder" and link to:
# https://cv-builder.rauell.systems

# PROHIBITED USES
# - Misrepresenting generated content as independently verified.
# - Claiming guaranteed hiring or applicant-tracking-system results.
